## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Record number of clicks achieved; first vertical series (email security for verticals) showing strong rankings](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [50 new glossary pages ready for review; focus on high-volume keywords to address competitive gaps](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Discussions on improving glossary page design, including potential for adding CTAs or images](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Clarification on acceptable topics (e.g., vendor risk management) and keywords to target](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Record number of clicks achieved](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [First vertical series (email security for verticals) showing strong rankings:](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - \#1 for "email security for construction"
      - \#3 for "email security for hospitality"
      - \#2 for "email security for transportation"
  - [Focus on building topical authority around solutions and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Next content series to target solution-oriented angles and vertical angles](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [50 new glossary pages ready for review, addressing competitive keyword gaps](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Plan to launch 10 glossary pages per week plus articles](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Design and Layout Improvements

  - [Discussion on addressing white space in glossary pages without CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Potential for adding CTAs to glossary pages (e.g., related assets, whitepapers)](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Exploration of adding images to glossary entries:](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [Creative team's strict guidelines on imagery](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Previous approval for icons in glossary pages to be revisited](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

### Keyword and Topic Selection

  - [Clarification on acceptable topics (e.g., vendor risk management)](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Process for vetting acronyms and technical terms with product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Importance of newsletter and platform update emails as sources for relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Discussion on specific keywords: CNAPPs (vetoed), behavior-based threat detection (approved)](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)

### Content Refresh and Optimization

  - [Plan to analyze and refresh old blog posts for potential "hidden gems"](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Strategy to monitor and improve rankings for key target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Focus on performance-driven approach, including adding images to high-priority articles](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Web team commitment to work on API for article publishing in September, potentially speeding up the process](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to explore options for adding CTAs or images to glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Mariana to send meeting recap and 30 new article ideas for approval](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Team to revisit previously approved icons for glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Abdallah to find notes on previous image approval process for glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing performance for key target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AT3V-rAsN_sEe5qsqyDxxTJoj6sgVhfq?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
